So this is Queen and you must be Freddie Mercury. You've got a gift you all have.

ko: 퀸이 다른 wannabe 록스타들과 다른 점이 뭐야?

en: together playing to the other misfits. The outcasts right at the back of the

en: room who are pretty sure they don't belong either. We belong to them. We're a
ko: 우리는 그들에게 속해. 우리는 가족이야. 하지만 우리 중 누구도 같지 않아.
